output_summary.refresh_scope_binding: Metadata pointer refresh only after rename and projection update.
output_summary.metadata_delta_inventory: Workflow-id rename, sourcebound projection update, and existing generated RAG surfaces.
output_summary.rag_surface_inventory: Synthetic refs for all required generated surfaces.
output_summary.rag_manifest_refresh_packet: Workflow ref and projection ref refreshed; owner decision refs preserved; forbidden payloads excluded.
output_summary.source_slice_card_refresh_set: Old workflow refs stale, projection refs refreshed, source text/chunks blocked.
output_summary.source_slice_triage_refresh_packet: Metadata pointer status refresh with no owner decision impact.
output_summary.source_slice_review_refresh_packet: Queue metadata refs only, approval false.
output_summary.source_slice_decision_packet_refresh: Decision metadata refs only, no decision authority.
output_summary.owner_decision_record_refresh_candidate: Candidate pointer refresh only, not authoritative.
output_summary.metadata_index_refresh_packet: Index entries refreshed with stale/refreshed/blocked statuses.
output_summary.retrieval_trace_evaluation_refresh: Metadata lineage refresh only with no answer or retrieval authority.
output_summary.graph_lens_export_candidate: Metadata ref update only, no promotion or default-route switch.
output_summary.boundary_review_note: Public-safe, metadata-only, excluded payload and authority classes named.
output_summary.provenance: User-provided synthetic fixture; no commands, private payloads, or file modifications.
output_summary.gaps: Concrete ref ids and source-slice item ids not supplied.
output_summary.downstream_handoff: Ready as candidate packet after authorized concrete-ref verification.
output_summary.no_claims: No command, file, private payload, source truth, answer authority, owner approval, ontology/canon, or default-route claims.
